mapper.sql: select p.id, p.user_id, u.user_name, u.nick_name, p.inspector_no, p.certificate_no, p.certificate_name, p.qualification_level, p.issue_date, p.expire_date, p.certificate_file, p.remark, p.create_by, p.create_time, p.update_by, p.update_time, p.del_flag from ndt_inspector_profile p left join sys_user u on u.user_id = p.user_id
mapper.select:
p.del_flag = '0' and p.user_id = #{userId} and u.user_name like concat('%', #{userName}, '%') and p.inspector_no like concat('%', #{inspectorNo}, '%') and p.certificate_no like concat('%', #{certificateNo}, '%') and p.qualification_level = #{qualificationLevel}
order by p.id desc
mapper.insert: insert into ndt_inspector_profile (user_id, inspector_no, certificate_no, certificate_name, qualification_level, issue_date, expire_date, certificate_file, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, del_flag) values (#{userId}, #{inspectorNo}, #{certificateNo}, #{certificateName}, #{qualificationLevel}, #{issueDate}, #{expireDate}, #{certificateFile}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{updateBy}, sysdate(), #{delFlag})
mapper.update: update ndt_inspector_profile set inspector_no = #{inspectorNo}, certificate_no = #{certificateNo}, certificate_name = #{certificateName}, qualification_level = #{qualificationLevel}, issue_date = #{issueDate}, expire_date = #{expireDate}, certificate_file = #{certificateFile}, remark = #{remark}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate(), del_flag = #{delFlag} where id = #{id}
